title: Warm Dense Norwegian Oreo Casserole
description: A dense and herbal Norwegian dish featuring Oreo cream biscuits, perfect for a crowd, this low-glycemic-friendly dessert is a unique twist on traditional casseroles. It combines the richness of Oreos with the warmth of Norwegian spices.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the crushed Oreo cream biscuits and almond flour.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, eggs, heavy cream, vanilla extract, ground cinnamon, and ground nutmeg.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
